hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a secure compliance operating layer with role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and private deployment options tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.

trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens without secure controls
problem_description: Compliance data often spreads across disconnected systems without consistent access governance or evidence integrity. This creates gaps in audit trails, complicates bank due diligence, and reduces confidence in operational and regulatory reviews for institutional digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates role-based access, evidence integrity, audit logs and private deployment options into one compliant data protection architecture to strengthen audit readiness and support institutional trust for VASPs.
workflow_title: From access controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY structures role-based permissions, audit logs and data governance to preserve secure evidence and support compliance readiness in enterprise environments.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, case management and audit workflows for regulated VASPs and digital asset businesses with secure data governance.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented provider outputs into connected case workflows with automated routing, decision logging, evidence collection and regulatory rule updates to support institutional compliance processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence with role-based access and audit trails to support review readiness and traceability for supervisory and audit teams.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacement, providing a controlled integration layer with configurable roles, permissions and audit logging.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing compliance tools by orchestrating their outputs into structured review workflows, evidence packages and reports rather than replacing underlying provider systems.
final_title: Review secure data protection and governance
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, evidence integrity, audit logs and controlled compliance workflows for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
